overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a sunlit urban environment resembling Los Santos from GTA V. The journey transitions from a commercial strip featuring auto shops and fast food restaurants across a busy intersection to a residential neighborhood, with long afternoon shadows and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with auto shop and fast food

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the commercial sidewalk past parked vehicles and storefronts

entered.detail: commercial auto repair shop with distinctive yellow and black signage
vintage blue sedan parked along the curb
fast food restaurant with red and white facade and golden arches logo
large black empty billboard towering over the street
single-story suburban homes with front yards and fences
wooden power poles with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit commercial sidewalk with auto shops on the left and residential houses on the right. The camera passes a classic blue parked car and approaches a McDonald's restaurant in the distance, with utility poles lining the street and long afternoon shadows stretching across the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with traffic control

events.description: transitioning from commercial sidewalk to open intersection crosswalk
crossing the intersection while vehicles pass through on the left

agents.ego_description: navigating across the multi-lane intersection, moving from the commercial side to the residential side

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to the camera's path

entered.detail: tall metal pole with horizontal traffic signal arms
white regulatory sign with black text reading DO NOT BLOCK INTERSECTION
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
white station wagon parked at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera steps off the curb and crosses the asphalt. A silver sedan passes through the intersection on the left while the camera navigates around a parked white wagon near a 'DO NOT BLOCK' sign and yellow fire hydrant, transitioning from the commercial strip toward the residential neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with front yards and mature trees

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the residential sidewalk past front yards and mature trees

notable_agents.action: woman in a tank top walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: mature tree with spreading branches and sparse foliage on the front lawn
low stone retaining wall in front of a residential property

segments.scene_description: Now on the residential side of the intersection, the camera walks along a sidewalk lined with single-family homes and mature trees. A woman pedestrian approaches and passes by in the opposite direction, while across the street, the commercial buildings remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit commercial strip into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins by moving along a sidewalk past auto shops and a parked blue car, heading toward a distant McDonald's under the stretch of long afternoon shadows. As the camera reaches the edge of the commercial zone, it steps off the curb to cross a wide asphalt intersection, navigating around a parked white wagon and a yellow fire hydrant while a silver sedan passes by. The scene then shifts into a residential area as the camera ascends the opposite sidewalk, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the view opens up to a street lined with mature trees and single-family homes, leaving the commercial buildings visible in the distant background.
